title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.245 - Abortions, only physicians to perform — violations, penalty
text:
334.245.  Abortions, only physicians to perform — violations, penalty. — 1.  Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary that may allow a person to provide services relating to pregnancy, including prenatal, delivery, and postpartum services, no person other than a licensed physician is authorized to perform or induce an abortion.
  2.  Any person who violates the provisions of this section is guilty of a class B felony.
(L. 2010 S.B. 793)
